notes: Fixes PC Link streaming on composite by selecting the Pi V3D DRM card for Moonlight SDL instead of the composite connector card.
Keeps the Moonlight DRM device override available through the systemd launch helper for troubleshooting unusual display layouts.
Improves first-run PC Link pairing feedback with live status messages after the PIN appears.
Adds a PC Link pairing timeout so a failed Sunshine handshake returns to setup instead of sitting forever.
